name: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang

contentSummary.displayName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
contentSummary.defaultName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
contentSummary.localeName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  As an added bonus, restaurant is provided on-site to conveniently serve your needs.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

reviews.hotelName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: Clean and tidy, lying at the edge of the reef, it makes for a quite beautiful sight. This accommodation is a business owned by the village, managed by the residents and village officials. 😍😍
comments.originalComment: Berdih dan rapi, tertelatak diujung karang, jadi pemandangan cukup indah. Penginapan ini merupakan Badan Usaha milik Desa, yg dikelola oleh warga dan perangkat desa😍😍

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewNegatives:
The room and bathroom not clean. The owner asked us to click not stay at his place when we check out. Seriously we dont understand his motive. We staying at this place for 2 nights and paid by cash. but the owner said we didn’t stay that his place to the booking.com. 
Unfortunately i didn’t request for the receipt when i paid.
comments.reviewPositives: Location good for the view. But difficult to find food and far from other attractions place

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: Family accommodation type, complete facilities, seaview, friendly prices, five-star service.
comments.reviewTitle: Recommended seaview room in Sabang Sumur Tiga
comments.originalTitle: Recommended seaview room in Sabang Sumur Tiga
comments.originalComment: Tipe penginapan keluarga, fasilitas lengkap, seaview, harga ramah, pelayanan bintang 5

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: SGT2 would like to thank the staff for the cooperation provided and the excellent service throughout our stay here. The beautiful scenery, comfortable rooms, and affordable prices make us want to come here again.. God willing (",)
comments.originalComment: SGT2 BERTERIMA KASIH TERHADAP PENJAGA NYA ATAS KERJASAMA YG DIBERIKAN DAN LAYANAN YG BAGUS SEPANJANG KAMI MENGINAP DI SINI..TEMPAT PEMANDANGAN YANG INDAH DAN BILIK YG SELESA DAN HARGA MURAH..CADANG MAHU LG KE SINI.. INSYAALLAH (",)

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: The accommodation is good, with complete and clean facilities. A suggestion for those who want to stay is to stock up on food because at night it's a bit far to the city and there's minimal lighting. For drinks, there is already a dispenser and a refrigerator to store beverages, awesome!
comments.originalComment: Penginapannya bagus, fasilitas lengkap & bersih, saran aja buat yg mau nginap jangan lupa stok makanan karna malam agak jauh ke kota & minim penerangan, utk minum udah ada dispenser & kulkas utk masukin minuman, kereeeen

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: The accommodation is comfortable, there is AC, clean, and the facilities are complete, but one downside is that the bathtub could be cleaned first. Overall, it is good and comfortable to stay here, and the location is also strategic, not too far from the city center.
comments.originalComment: Penginapannya nyaman, ada AC, Bersih dan fasilitasnya lengkap, cuma kurang nya, mungkin bak mandi nya di bersihkan terlebih dahulu, cuma overall bagus dan nyaman nginap disini, dan tempat nya juga strategis, ga terlalu jauh dari pusat kota

score.hotelName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: A nice place to stay. Unfortunately, many visitors only come to take photos but leave litter scattered around. The room facilities are good and complete.
comments.originalComment:
Tempat yg bagus untuk menginap
Sayang,banyak pengunjung yg hanya sekedar berfoto tapi membuat sampah berserakan

Fasilitas kamar bagus,komplit

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: Staying here specifically to enjoy the sunrise and the beautiful gradient view of the sea.
comments.originalComment: Menginap disini khusus untuk menikmati sunrise dan view gradasi lautnya yang indah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: For those who have a hobby of fishing, this location is highly recommended, as it is very close to the accommodation. There is no supermarket near the hotel, sleeping is safe and comfortable, the air conditioning is chilly, cleanliness needs to be improved, no extra bed is provided, and there is no breakfast.
comments.originalComment: Untuk yang hobi mancing sangat direkomendasikan lokasi disini, karena dekat sekali dengan penginapan, tidak ada supermarket didekat lokasi hotel, tidur aman dan nyaman, AC menggigil, kebersihan perlu ditingkatkan, tidak menyediakan extrabed, tidak ada sarapan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: Strategic location... Close to the city... With Sumur Tiga beach... And the port... Privacy is maintained... And hopefully next time we can return there with a group for a BBQ event.
comments.originalComment: Lokasi strategis... Dekat dgn kota.. Dgn pantai sumur tiga.. Dan pelabuhan.. Privasi terjaga.. Dan smoga next time bisa balik kesana bw rombongan buat acra bbq disana

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments:
Cool place.. 
My suggestion is.. 
For those who love fishing... 
You must bring fishing gear... 
Next time I will stay here again.
comments.originalComment:
Keren tempat nya..
Saran sih..
Bagi yg hobi mancing... 
Wajib nih bawa pancing...
Next bakalan nginap lagi disini

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments:
Recommended with caution because:

The first access road is quite steep and high. If you’re driving a rental car like a Honda Brio, the bottom of the car might scrape.

Basic amenities such as body soap and shampoo are not provided.

However, the price is very reasonable, and the area is absolutely beautiful!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: I went with a small group 4 people, the room is clean, the location is good, overall we satisfied....

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: If possible, please clean the ceiling of the room, the air conditioning isn't cold enough, and the bathroom is too dim, giving it a horror vibe.
comments.originalComment: Kalau bisa ruangan nya atap nya di bersihin,ac nya kurang dingin,kamar mandi nya terlalu remang remang jd kesan nya horor

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: Poor. Both hygiene and service are bad. They don't provide change after receiving money and don't actively return documents.
comments.originalComment: Poor. Hygiene and service are both bad. They don't give change after receiving money and don't return documents actively.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: The staff service is incredibly friendly and tries to be quick. The facilities are appropriate for the price, the location is extraordinary, especially during sunrise, it's amazing.
comments.originalComment: Pelayanan staffnya luar biasa ramah dan berusaha gercep. Fasilitas sesuai harga, lokasi luar biasa apalagi ketika sunrise, beuh lagak that.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments: Humble staff, great view

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Ujong Kareung Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: The place is comfortable for relaxing away from the hustle and bustle of the city, but there is no wifi, even though the app says there is free wifi; overall, everything is good.
comments.originalComment: Tempatnya nyaman, utk santai dari hiruk pikuk kota, tapi tidak ada wifinya, padahal d aplikasi free wifi, tapi utk overall bagus semua
